title: Foundation Models for Geospatial Intelligence: A Survey
headline: Comprehensive survey maps the geospatial foundation model landscape
tldr: This survey systematically reviews large-scale pre-trained models adapted for satellite imagery, LiDAR, and geospatial vector data. The authors benchmark 30+ models across detection, segmentation, and change-detection tasks.
significance: Gives practitioners a unified framework for selecting and fine-tuning geospatial foundation models for downstream Earth observation tasks.
